doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such protocol exists, and the State Bar/LSTFC lacks authority to waive UPL under B&P §6125 as described.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such "EAJP-2025" protocol exists; the State Bar/LSTFC has no authority to waive UPL under B&P §6125, and the document's substantive provisions contradict California's actual regulatory framework.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such protocol exists, and the State Bar/LSTFC lacks authority to waive UPL under B&P §6125 as described.
